name: Ham & Swiss Appetizer Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Spread Dijon mustard evenly on the bread shell.
3. Place the bread shell, ungreased side up, on a cookie sheet.
4. Arrange ham, green onions, and Swiss cheese over the mustard.
5. Bake for 6-8 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
6. Cut into small squares to serve. Makes 64 appetizers.
